results.title: Conformidade WCAG 2.1 AA no formulario de pratica

violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
affected_elements: <button class="cky-btn cky-btn-customize" aria-label="Customize" aria-haspopup="true" aria-controls="ckyPreferenceCenter" data-cky-tag="settings-button" style="color: rgb(42, 165, 39); border-color: rgb(42, 165, 39); background-color: transparent;" aria-expanded="false">Customize</button>

<button class="cky-btn cky-btn-reject" aria-label="Reject All" data-cky-tag="reject-button" style="color: rgb(42, 165, 39); border-color: rgb(42, 165, 39); background-color: transparent;">Reject All</button>

<button class="cky-btn cky-btn-accept" aria-label="Accept All" data-cky-tag="accept-button" style="color: #FFFFFF; border-color: rgb(42, 165, 39); background-color: rgb(42, 165, 39);">Accept All</button>
violations.how_to_fix:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.22 (foreground color: #2aa527, background color: #ffffff, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

results.title: Conformidade WCAG 2.1 AA na pagina inicial de citacoes

violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.how_to_fix:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.71 (foreground color: #4582ec, background color: #ffffff, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

violations.description: Ensure links are distinguished from surrounding text in a way that does not rely on color
violations.how_to_fix:
Fix any of the following:
  The link has insufficient color contrast of 2.46:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #b02cce, surrounding text: #333333)
  The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text
